title: The Escape Plan Tightens
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The central beat is the escape plan tightens.
scene: The scene focuses on the escape plan tightens, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7 shaping the Punk Hazard finale and the road toward Dressrosa.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Wouldn't be able to break this wall....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: What the!? You!! You have an ability!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Master, please get away from here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Shuroro rorororo!! I'm looking forward to it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I won't let you go after him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: If something were to happen to master...

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: I would be eliminated by joker

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Connecting passage between a and B- blocks

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We've got to run!! Hurry up!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: "Black leg" of the Straw Hat pirate crew!!

summary: The Escape Plan Tightens. This part advances the collapse of Caesar’s operation, Law’s leverage over Doflamingo, and the alliance’s next destination.
